precedence_contract: manifest shape and frozen safety invariants
duplicate source ID before any source-file open
source path, hash, optional size, TSV schema, timestamp, OHLC, boundary, chronology, row count, and declared range
aggregate OHLC conflict before identical duplicate timestamp
aggregate source count, total rows, first timestamp, last timestamp, and exact frozen-boundary range

codes.meaning: Declared runtime source path is not a file.
Source bytes do not match the declared SHA-256.
Source byte size does not match the optional declaration.
Required MT5 TSV OHLC columns are absent or invalid.
A source row timestamp cannot be parsed by the frozen profile.
A source OHLC value is non-finite or non-positive.
A source OHLC tuple violates high/low consistency.
A row precedes the frozen start boundary.
A row follows the frozen end boundary.
Source timestamps are not strictly increasing.
Observed source rows differ from the declaration.
Observed source first timestamp differs from the declaration.
Observed source last timestamp differs from the declaration.
Two source descriptors declare the same source ID; detected before file I/O.
The same aggregate timestamp carries conflicting OHLC tuples.
The same aggregate timestamp occurs across sources with identical OHLC.
Observed source count differs from expected timeline metadata.
Observed aggregate rows differ from expected timeline metadata.
Observed aggregate first timestamp differs from expected timeline metadata.
Observed aggregate last timestamp differs from expected timeline metadata.
Observed aggregate first/last timestamps do not exactly cover the frozen manifest boundaries.
Canonical aggregate bars do not match the expected timeline SHA-256.
